markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content strategy and operational plan for the next three months.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New 3-Month Contract:** The contract was cut from 12 to 3 months, creating urgency to prove ROI and secure a full renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The strategy shifts from social media to a long-term organic search play, building authority via a new `/resources` hub and Vizcom University.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Automated Publishing:** A Webflow API will automate publishing, removing a manual bottleneck and freeing up Vizcom's time.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [**Diversified Voice:** Content will feature multiple experts (e.g., Product Experts, Product Designers) to build broader credibility, moving away from a single "Jordan's voice" approach.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

## Topics

### New Contract & Urgency

  - [Jordan's involvement increases for the next 3 months to gain clarity on GrowthX's value.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [The contract was cut from 12 months to 3, creating pressure to prove ROI and secure a full renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use this period to build a compounding asset (organic search) that justifies the long-term investment.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [**Pillar:** Build authority by teaching designers *how to think*, not just *how to do*.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**New Hub:** Create a separate `/resources` hub for guides and thought leadership, distinct from the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Vizcom University:** A key component for video content, featuring a diversified faculty (Product Experts, Product Designers) to build broader credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Content:** Industry-specific mini-courses (e.g., prompting for automotive) and lessons on design frameworks.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [**Content Mix:** A phased shift to prioritize high-value editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** 5 blog articles/week + 2 editorials/week](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** 2 blog articles/week + 4 editorials/week](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [**Phase 3:** Editorial content only](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Operational Plan

  - [**Automated Publishing:** A Webflow API will automate publishing, removing a manual bottleneck for Vizcom.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX stages content → Vizcom reviews → Vizcom clicks "Ready for publishing" → Content auto-publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Author Attribution:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [**Interim:** Sophia Silver will be the author on all new content.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [**Long-Term:** Kim Lu will coordinate with Nico (Head of Product Experts) to assign articles to relevant PEs, leveraging their industry authority.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [**Tracking & Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [GrowthX will implement UTM tracking on blog CTAs to measure user journeys.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [Vizcom will provide attribution data (signups, demos) for the QBR to prove ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [Refine the strategy deck to reflect the diversified "expert voice" approach.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [Clarify required Webflow API permissions with Maura.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Implement UTM tracking on blog CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [**Sophia:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
      - [Send Vizcom University topics/cadence to Carly for keyword research alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [**Kim:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [Publish the current batch of staged blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)
      - [Coordinate with Nico to identify Product Experts willing to be authors.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [**Maura:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Provide the Webflow API key once permissions are confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/zzRpgCEyRnFBXj73txJhqvgmkp1o7nif?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
